# Required Image Assets for Nilkamal agro Farms

## Hero Slideshow & Journey Images (7 files)
- `stage-1.jpeg` — Mango seed
- `stage-2.jpeg` — Sprout emerging from soil
- `stage-3.jpeg` — Growing sapling
- `stage-4.jpeg` — Majestic mango tree
- `stage-5.jpeg` — Golden blossoms on tree
- `stage-6.jpeg` — Raw green mango on branch
- `stage-7.jpeg` — Ripe golden Kesar mango

## About Section
- `hero.png` — Photo of the Nilkamal agro Farms orchards

Place your high-resolution jpeg files here. 
The hero slideshow cycles stage-1 through stage-7 every 3 seconds.
The journey section shows stages synced with scroll progress.
